title: Research Toolkit: a free, single-file, browser-based toolkit for research workflows

creators.name: Kher, Mafatlal M.
creators.affiliation: Department of Chemical Engineering, Ariel University, Israel

creators.name: Drori, Elyashiv
creators.affiliation: Department of Chemical Engineering, Ariel University, Israel

description: Free, single-file, browser-based companion tools to QueryBee for the literature-review and bench-science workflow: a guide to free tools for every review stage, a PRISMA 2020 flow-diagram maker, a citation de-duplicator, a reference formatter, an abstract-screening referral, bench calculators (molecular biology, qPCR, solutions, and a tissue-culture studio), and a tissue-culture manuscript checklist. No account, API key, or server is required. Released under the MIT licence.
